semmcci 1.1.6

Sampling Covariance Matrix of the Parameter Estimates

Source: R/semmcci-methods.R
vcov.semmcci.Rd

Sampling Covariance Matrix of the Parameter Estimates

Usage

# S3 method for class 'semmcci'
vcov(object, ...)

Arguments

object

Object of class semmcci.

...

additional arguments.

Value

Returns a matrix of the variance-covariance matrix of parameter estimates.

Author

Ivan Jacob Agaloos Pesigan

Examples

library(semmcci)
library(lavaan)

# Data ---------------------------------------------------------------------
data("Tal.Or", package = "psych")
df <- mice::ampute(Tal.Or)$amp

# Monte Carlo --------------------------------------------------------------
## Fit Model in lavaan -----------------------------------------------------
model <- "
  reaction ~ cp * cond + b * pmi
  pmi ~ a * cond
  cond ~~ cond
  indirect := a * b
  direct := cp
  total := cp + (a * b)
"
fit <- sem(data = df, model = model, missing = "fiml")

## MC() --------------------------------------------------------------------
unstd <- MC(
  fit,
  R = 5L # use a large value e.g., 20000L for actual research
)

## Standardized Monte Carlo ------------------------------------------------
std <- MCStd(unstd)
vcov(unstd)
#>                              cp            b            a    cond~~cond
#> cp                  0.040042535  0.012130456  0.033360819 -0.0020214905
#> b                   0.012130456  0.007287929  0.012256336 -0.0017078193
#> a                   0.033360819  0.012256336  0.094978382 -0.0035584013
#> cond~~cond         -0.002021491 -0.001707819 -0.003558401  0.0006777342
#> reaction~~reaction -0.011304254  0.005867783  0.080851168 -0.0050235770
#> pmi~~pmi            0.016239579  0.011678955  0.010721224 -0.0064611724
#> reaction~1         -0.101051629 -0.051813923 -0.124452076  0.0110834340
#> pmi~1              -0.026102163 -0.007238547 -0.040647892  0.0021527259
#> cond~1              0.001178961 -0.001516497  0.002839993  0.0004300381
#> indirect            0.020377881  0.009219943  0.046244546 -0.0023691568
#> direct              0.040042535  0.012130456  0.033360819 -0.0020214905
#> total               0.060420417  0.021350400  0.079605365 -0.0043906473
#>                    reaction~~reaction     pmi~~pmi   reaction~1        pmi~1
#> cp                       -0.011304254  0.016239579 -0.101051629 -0.026102163
#> b                         0.005867783  0.011678955 -0.051813923 -0.007238547
#> a                         0.080851168  0.010721224 -0.124452076 -0.040647892
#> cond~~cond               -0.005023577 -0.006461172  0.011083434  0.002152726
#> reaction~~reaction        0.142622908  0.024307176 -0.056315063 -0.019435176
#> pmi~~pmi                  0.024307176  0.082542966 -0.061641633 -0.018778882
#> reaction~1               -0.056315063 -0.061641633  0.395179248  0.067092668
#> pmi~1                    -0.019435176 -0.018778882  0.067092668  0.024882414
#> cond~1                   -0.001201779 -0.002941873  0.006873471 -0.002057748
#> indirect                  0.036878066  0.009561487 -0.081221357 -0.020474442
#> direct                   -0.011304254  0.016239579 -0.101051629 -0.026102163
#> total                     0.025573812  0.025801066 -0.182272986 -0.046576605
#>                           cond~1      indirect       direct        total
#> cp                  0.0011789605  0.0203778815  0.040042535  0.060420417
#> b                  -0.0015164975  0.0092199434  0.012130456  0.021350400
#> a                   0.0028399925  0.0462445456  0.033360819  0.079605365
#> cond~~cond          0.0004300381 -0.0023691568 -0.002021491 -0.004390647
#> reaction~~reaction -0.0012017787  0.0368780663 -0.011304254  0.025573812
#> pmi~~pmi           -0.0029418733  0.0095614869  0.016239579  0.025801066
#> reaction~1          0.0068734710 -0.0812213573 -0.101051629 -0.182272986
#> pmi~1              -0.0020577482 -0.0204744416 -0.026102163 -0.046576605
#> cond~1              0.0011428800  0.0002486297  0.001178961  0.001427590
#> indirect            0.0002486297  0.0244147494  0.020377881  0.044792631
#> direct              0.0011789605  0.0203778815  0.040042535  0.060420417
#> total               0.0014275903  0.0447926309  0.060420417  0.105213048
vcov(std)
#>                               cp             b             a    cond~~cond
#> cp                  3.320134e-03  1.867638e-03  2.162046e-03  2.984165e-18
#> b                   1.867638e-03  5.108551e-03 -6.115139e-04  1.749156e-18
#> a                   2.162046e-03 -6.115139e-04  1.283574e-02 -1.135472e-17
#> cond~~cond          2.984165e-18  1.749156e-18 -1.135472e-17  2.773339e-32
#> reaction~~reaction -3.151537e-03 -5.106455e-03 -2.063152e-03 -5.571085e-19
#> pmi~~pmi           -5.742561e-04  1.718005e-04 -2.620896e-03  1.204687e-18
#> indirect            1.161478e-03  5.859212e-04  5.138798e-03 -4.347311e-18
#> direct              3.320134e-03  1.867638e-03  2.162046e-03  2.984165e-18
#> total               4.481612e-03  2.453559e-03  7.300845e-03 -1.363146e-18
#>                    reaction~~reaction      pmi~~pmi      indirect        direct
#> cp                      -3.151537e-03 -5.742561e-04  1.161478e-03  3.320134e-03
#> b                       -5.106455e-03  1.718005e-04  5.859212e-04  1.867638e-03
#> a                       -2.063152e-03 -2.620896e-03  5.138798e-03  2.162046e-03
#> cond~~cond              -5.571085e-19  1.204687e-18 -4.347311e-18  2.984165e-18
#> reaction~~reaction       5.970681e-03  3.810688e-04 -1.664711e-03 -3.151537e-03
#> pmi~~pmi                 3.810688e-04  6.317505e-04 -1.045462e-03 -5.742561e-04
#> indirect                -1.664711e-03 -1.045462e-03  2.193885e-03  1.161478e-03
#> direct                  -3.151537e-03 -5.742561e-04  1.161478e-03  3.320134e-03
#> total                   -4.816248e-03 -1.619718e-03  3.355363e-03  4.481612e-03
#>                            total
#> cp                  4.481612e-03
#> b                   2.453559e-03
#> a                   7.300845e-03
#> cond~~cond         -1.363146e-18
#> reaction~~reaction -4.816248e-03
#> pmi~~pmi           -1.619718e-03
#> indirect            3.355363e-03
#> direct              4.481612e-03
#> total               7.836974e-03

# Monte Carlo (Multiple Imputation) ----------------------------------------
## Multiple Imputation -----------------------------------------------------
mi <- mice::mice(
  data = df,
  print = FALSE,
  m = 5L, # use a large value e.g., 100L for actual research,
  seed = 42
)

## Fit Model in lavaan -----------------------------------------------------
fit <- sem(data = df, model = model) # use default listwise deletion

## MCMI() ------------------------------------------------------------------
unstd <- MCMI(
  fit,
  mi = mi,
  R = 5L # use a large value e.g., 20000L for actual research
)

## Standardized Monte Carlo ------------------------------------------------
std <- MCStd(unstd)
vcov(unstd)
#>                              cp            b            a    cond~~cond
#> cp                  0.084334074 -0.007456162 -0.004882804  0.0012827785
#> b                  -0.007456162  0.005464587  0.002075692 -0.0016134476
#> a                  -0.004882804  0.002075692  0.015510684  0.0018899489
#> cond~~cond          0.001282779 -0.001613448  0.001889949  0.0011045333
#> reaction~~reaction  0.092715184 -0.007489984  0.015903721  0.0040806322
#> pmi~~pmi           -0.024899443 -0.001772364  0.011022381  0.0019346539
#> indirect           -0.006978740  0.003960825  0.007615140 -0.0001380404
#> direct              0.084334074 -0.007456162 -0.004882804  0.0012827785
#> total               0.077355335 -0.003495337  0.002732336  0.0011447381
#>                    reaction~~reaction     pmi~~pmi      indirect       direct
#> cp                        0.092715184 -0.024899443 -0.0069787396  0.084334074
#> b                        -0.007489984 -0.001772364  0.0039608248 -0.007456162
#> a                         0.015903721  0.011022381  0.0076151395 -0.004882804
#> cond~~cond                0.004080632  0.001934654 -0.0001380404  0.001282779
#> reaction~~reaction        0.134395495 -0.009685137  0.0015631318  0.092715184
#> pmi~~pmi                 -0.009685137  0.021829317  0.0038720342 -0.024899443
#> indirect                  0.001563132  0.003872034  0.0054150994 -0.006978740
#> direct                    0.092715184 -0.024899443 -0.0069787396  0.084334074
#> total                     0.094278315 -0.021027409 -0.0015636401  0.077355335
#>                           total
#> cp                  0.077355335
#> b                  -0.003495337
#> a                   0.002732336
#> cond~~cond          0.001144738
#> reaction~~reaction  0.094278315
#> pmi~~pmi           -0.021027409
#> indirect           -0.001563640
#> direct              0.077355335
#> total               0.075791695
vcov(std)
#>                               cp             b             a    cond~~cond
#> cp                  8.613243e-03 -5.641676e-03 -1.835859e-04 -2.536170e-18
#> b                  -5.641676e-03  5.220616e-03  2.886162e-06  2.439390e-18
#> a                  -1.835859e-04  2.886162e-06  2.175214e-03 -1.131121e-18
#> cond~~cond         -2.536170e-18  2.439390e-18 -1.131121e-18  3.081488e-33
#> reaction~~reaction  1.760878e-03 -2.386599e-03 -3.646141e-04 -9.116197e-19
#> pmi~~pmi            9.333124e-05  4.051467e-05 -7.810645e-04  4.412313e-19
#> indirect           -1.341752e-03  1.124623e-03  8.394727e-04  1.197432e-19
#> direct              8.613243e-03 -5.641676e-03 -1.835859e-04 -2.536170e-18
#> total               7.271491e-03 -4.517053e-03  6.558868e-04 -2.416427e-18
#>                    reaction~~reaction      pmi~~pmi      indirect        direct
#> cp                       1.760878e-03  9.333124e-05 -1.341752e-03  8.613243e-03
#> b                       -2.386599e-03  4.051467e-05  1.124623e-03 -5.641676e-03
#> a                       -3.646141e-04 -7.810645e-04  8.394727e-04 -1.835859e-04
#> cond~~cond              -9.116197e-19  4.412313e-19  1.197432e-19 -2.536170e-18
#> reaction~~reaction       1.439772e-03  8.775596e-05 -6.342542e-04  1.760878e-03
#> pmi~~pmi                 8.775596e-05  2.832069e-04 -2.934798e-04  9.333124e-05
#> indirect                -6.342542e-04 -2.934798e-04  5.683679e-04 -1.341752e-03
#> direct                   1.760878e-03  9.333124e-05 -1.341752e-03  8.613243e-03
#> total                    1.126624e-03 -2.001485e-04 -7.733838e-04  7.271491e-03
#>                            total
#> cp                  7.271491e-03
#> b                  -4.517053e-03
#> a                   6.558868e-04
#> cond~~cond         -2.416427e-18
#> reaction~~reaction  1.126624e-03
#> pmi~~pmi           -2.001485e-04
#> indirect           -7.733838e-04
#> direct              7.271491e-03
#> total               6.498107e-03
